title: Her Wealth Is Proof, Not Theft
subtitle: An affirmation for choosing abundance thinking over scarcity thinking when another woman succeeds
excerpt: A single-sentence affirmation for the moment when another woman's financial success triggers comparison. States the alternative frame directly: her wealth is proof that this is possible, not a subtraction from what's available for you.

content.text: A short affirmation for the moment when comparison arrives. Not a lecture about abundance thinking, just the reframe, stated cleanly, in a form that can be repeated.
Her wealth is proof, not theft. There is enough for both of us.
Say it when the comparison lands, not at a distance from it. Three times is enough. The affirmation works best said immediately. It interrupts the scarcity logic before the story builds around it.
